description: Build a standalone Bun + TypeScript log analysis workspace in this monorepo at packages/analysis for adaptive-agent file-based run logs.

userStories.title: Scaffold analysis workspace
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a new monorepo workspace at packages/analysis so the log analyzer can be implemented independently as @adaptive-agent/analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/analysis with package name @adaptive-agent/analysis
Add package scripts for build and test using Bun
Add a TypeScript entrypoint and exported CLI stub
Running bun run --cwd packages/analysis build succeeds
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created packages/analysis as @adaptive-agent/analysis with Bun build/test/typecheck scripts, a minimal CLI stub, and a Vitest smoke test.

userStories.title: Add CLI argument parsing and help output
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want a usable CLI shell with documented commands so I can invoke the analyzer consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI supports at least analyze command and help output
Help output documents file, directory, and glob inputs
CLI accepts one or more input arguments without analyzing them yet
Running bun run --cwd packages/analysis src/cli.ts --help succeeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement input discovery for files directories and globs
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want the analyzer to resolve file paths, directories, and glob patterns into a concrete file list.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement input discovery for files, directories, and glob patterns
Unreadable paths are reported without crashing by default
Add tests covering files, directories, and glob resolution
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement streaming NDJSON log parser
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want a streaming parser for newline-delimited JSON logs so large files can be processed safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse NDJSON logs using streaming IO rather than full-file reads
Malformed JSON lines are counted and surfaced as diagnostics
Parser returns raw event objects with source file and line metadata
Add parser tests for valid and invalid lines
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Normalize raw log events
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want parsed events normalized into typed records so downstream analysis is deterministic and forward-compatible.
acceptanceCriteria: Normalize known event fields including time, event, run IDs, tool name, and duration
Unknown event types are preserved as generic normalized events
Add normalization tests for known and unknown event types
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Reconstruct run graph and timelines
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want normalized events grouped into runs and ordered timelines so execution flow can be inspected end to end.
acceptanceCriteria: Group events by runId and link root and parent run relationships
Produce ordered timelines for each run
Expose run summaries with start time, end time, and event counts
Add tests for run graph reconstruction
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add terminal overview report
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want a default terminal summary so I can inspect log sets quickly from the command line.
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze command prints run counts, success counts, and duration summary to the terminal
Terminal output includes top tools by usage when available
Add tests for overview report formatting using representative fixtures
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add JSON report output
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want a stable JSON report so scripts and CI can consume analyzer results programmatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement JSON output with stable top-level keys for summary, runs, tools, and diagnostics
CLI can write JSON output to stdout or a file path
Add tests for JSON report structure
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Compute tool usage and latency statistics
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want tool counts and latency metrics so I can identify overused and slow tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Compute invocation counts by toolName
Compute success rate and latency stats for tools when durationMs is present
Differentiate direct tools from delegate.* synthetic tools
Add tests for tool aggregation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Compute failure clusters and retry signals
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want failure grouping and retry heuristics so I can prioritize stability issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect failed tool and run completions from structured output fields
Group failures by tool name, error name, and error value snippet
Flag likely retry loops from repeated step or tool executions
Add tests for failure clustering and retry detection
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Compute bottlenecks and waiting time
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want bottleneck metrics and inter-event gaps so I can see where run time is spent.
acceptanceCriteria: Compute slowest runs, slowest steps, and longest inter-event gaps
Estimate waiting time related to child-run delegation and status transitions when possible
Add tests for bottleneck calculations using fixtures
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add single-run drill-down mode
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want to inspect one run deeply so I can debug a problematic execution.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI supports selecting a run by runId or rootRunId
Single-run output includes timeline, failures, and child-run relationships
Add tests for run selection and drill-down rendering
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Markdown HTML and CSV exporters
userStories.description: As an engineer or analyst, I want shareable and spreadsheet-friendly report formats so results can be reused outside the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Markdown and HTML report emitters
Implement CSV exports for runs, tools, failures, and cohorts
CLI supports selecting multiple output formats in one invocation
Add tests for exporter outputs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add cohort comparison and anomaly detection
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want baseline comparison and anomaly signals so I can detect regressions across providers and models.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate cohorts by provider, model, delegate, and time window
Support baseline comparison for duration, success rate, token usage, and tool counts
Produce rule-based anomaly findings with human-readable explanations
Add tests for cohort comparisons and anomaly rules
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add config profiles and watch mode
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want reusable config profiles and live watch mode so repeated and live analyses are easy to run.
acceptanceCriteria: Support config file defaults for inputs, thresholds, and outputs
Support named profiles such as overview, failures, bottlenecks, and compare
Implement watch mode for appended lines or new matching files
Add tests for config resolution and watch-mode behavior where practical
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
